subject: fix(pwa): service worker regex missing @main in CDN URL pattern
body:
The manifest.json URL contains @main (canva-grid-assets@main/manifest.json)
but the SW urlPattern regex expected a bare slash after the repo name. This
caused the manifest to fall through to the CacheFirst images rule instead of
StaleWhileRevalidate, locking users into stale manifests for up to 30 days.

Add optional (@[^/]+)? group to both CDN URL patterns so they match
versioned jsDelivr URLs (@main, @v2, etc.).

Tags: pwa, cache, service-worker, sample-images
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: sample-images
Semver: patch

title: service worker regex missing @main in CDN URL pattern
